title: Score Interpretation
description: A standardized interpretation of a set of topic scores, typically one of several in a score interpretation list.

id.description: Unique identifier for this score interpretation. Kebab case. Ex: 'my-interpretation-id'

name.description: A friendly name used for display

description.description: A brief explanation of this score interpretation

requirements.description: A set of topics and required scores for this interpretation.

^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*(?:\\.[a-z0-9]+.description: Score level required for the topic
